case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. RACHELE VISTA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION JANET L. BROWN FILED RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT VISTA, RACHELE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-06-2010

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VISTA, RACHELE $9,293.82 PRINCIPAL, $150.13 INTEREST, $269.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,713.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
